decoding_model.normalization: Raw DA palette variants carry palette-setting metadata in reserved color-word slots 0, 16, 32, and 48. The .fts visual palette rows zero those reserved slots.
decoding_model.payload_model: The payload is 96 SNES BGR555 words encoded as three 0-v base32-like characters per word, least-significant five-bit digit first.
decoding_model.row_id_model: row_id[0] is the 0-v tileset/palette asset id; row_id[1] is the palette variant id.

source_policy: ROM-verified/reference-derived contract. This records row IDs, hashes, counts, and small metadata words only; it does not commit raw .fts rows or decoded 192-byte palette payload arrays.
title: Map FTS Palette Variant Contract
